title: HIVE's BUZZ Signs $30 Million in AI Cloud Contracts, Accelerating Global HPC Tier-III Data Center Expansion
text: BUZZ High Performance Computing, HIVE Digital Technologies' HPC data center division, announced customer agreements valued at approximately $30 million over two-year terms. The contracts support deployment of 504 liquid-cooled GPU servers at the Canada West facility in Manitoba, expected to launch in Q1 2026. Management projects this initial phase will generate roughly $15 million in annual recurring revenue once operational. The expansion is part of a broader strategy to grow HIVE's HPC segment revenue from approximately $20 million to $35 million annually. According to leadership, the company targets scaling its GPU AI cloud business toward approximately $140 million in ARR over the next year, subject to market conditions. Management outlined a vision to deploy 2,000 AI-optimized GPUs at the Canada West facility throughout 2026. The announcement reflects HIVE's dual-engine approach combining cryptocurrency mining infrastructure with high-performance AI computing across facilities in Canada, Sweden, and Paraguay. Strategic partnerships with Dell and Bell Canada support the infrastructure scaling efforts.
